pundit.name: Alexi Lalas
pundit.take:
*Let me tell you something, Gunner, you're in first place by default, not design.*

France has been carrying you, Bubba G, but the real question is why you bet on the likes of DR Congo. What are you doing, man? Just because you wear a beret doesn't mean you've got the sophistication to handle this fantasy game! I foresee a narrow victory for France in Arlington, but the true victory will be learning that luck, not skill, is your real partner in crime.

Meanwhile, Mustard Boy, Zach, you gotta look yourself in the mirror and ask: Is Switzerland really the hill you want to die on? Sure, Brazil's been your golden goose, but when the chips were down, you thought Saudi Arabia was a legitimate choice?! Let me predict it now: Zach's house of cards crumbles at East Rutherford when Ghana shows what true grit looks like.

Oh, The Backpass Assassin! Gayden, your allegiance to Japan and Korea Republic screams a love for possession football without the killer instinct. A strategy that's as timid as it is misguided. England's colonial past won’t save you in Mexico City. I'm calling it now: Jordan's going to crash and burn, leaving you gasping for air and holding an empty bag of dreams.

Lastly, Rafe, "The Noisemaker," you're the definition of chaotic neutrality. Drafting Germany makes you look like a genius until you realize your first three picks weren't even in the tournament. Hats off for style, kid, but in reality, you're in last place because your chaos is camouflaged as innovation. The only thing predictable here? You’ll continue to pull off the impossible: Being predictably unpredictable and staying at the bottom.

pundit_takes.headline: Gunner Holds First Place Despite Zero Upset Points Scored
pundit_takes.subtitle: Leader in standings, not in surprises; creativity optional for top spot.

pundit_takes.headline: Zach's Brazil Edges Japan, Mustard Boy Slides to Second
pundit_takes.subtitle: Lost top spot faster than he drafts a Tier 1 team.

pundit_takes.headline: Rafe's Germany Stumbles to a Draw, No Points Added
pundit_takes.subtitle: A result that reflects the strategy of drafting non-qualifiers.

pundit_takes.headline: Devin Set to Boost Standings with Spain Leading the Charge
pundit_takes.subtitle: Ghost Pepper's spicy choice could ignite slow-burning campaign.

rome_analytics_quotes: Rafe's chaos agent act has a 2.0% chance of stealing the show.
Rafe's draft disaster proves even a trainwreck can have style — zero qualified teams, really?
Rafe's got Devin's number: 6-point head-to-head domination. Brutal dad vibes, but not his dad!
Gunner's 40% win odds took a hit as Rafe waltzed in — unexpected teen drama!
